## Summary
- What changed and why
- Files/paths touched

## Review Focus
- What should reviewers pay closest attention to?
- Any tricky logic, edge cases, or non-obvious decisions?

## Evidence
- Tests: `<command>` → `<N> passed`
- Benchmark/logs (if applicable): `<result>`

## Risk & Rollback
- Risk: low / medium / high
- Rollback: `git revert <commit SHA>` or toggle `<flag>`

## Track (if applicable)
- Level: Crawl / Walk / Run
- Exercise: Ex<N>
